_doc: Per-company whitelist for AutoSubmit. A company lands here when Rahil moves a card from 'sus-blocked' → 'autosubmit-ready' in the Kanban. Once whitelisted, future jobs at the SAME company on the SAME ATS board may be auto-submitted without further human-in-loop, per CLAUDE.md ethical-use rule (revision 2026-05-02). Fortune 500 companies are pre-approved via the FORTUNE_500 set in dashboard/job-pulse-kanban.html and do NOT need an entry here.

company_name_lower.validated_at: ISO-8601 timestamp when user moved first card to autosubmit-ready
company_name_lower.validated_via_card_id: live-N or seed card id that anchored the validation
company_name_lower.validated_role: title of the role that anchored validation (sanity reference)
